Combined description: 'Gwinear' from gpt-5-mini (better visual match) and '1 qr' from gemini-flash (consistent abbreviation). Both extractors agree on the £60 amount. gemini-flash's note provides strong justification for interpreting '60' as pounds, despite its visual placement in the pence column, to adhere to currency rules (60d and 60s are invalid within their respective columns). Visual verification confirms '60' on the far right.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Quarterly rent received from the Gwinear rectory, amounting to £60 0s 0d.
